SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.organizer

Class InvitedFragment

java.lang.Object
androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class InvitedFragment extends androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
Fragment displaying invited entrants for an event. Allows the organizer to notify all selected entrants.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    cancelEntrant(Map<String,String> entrant)
    Cancels an invited entrant by updating their status to "Cancelled" in Firestore.
    private void
    loadInvitedEntrants()
    Loads all entrants with status "Invited" from Firestore.
    private void
    loadProfileInfo(String deviceId, int index)
    Fetches the entrant's profile info from Firestore using their device ID.
    static InvitedFragment
    newInstance(String eventId)
    Use this factory method to create a new instance of this fragment using the provided parameters.
    private void
    notifyInvitedEntrants()
    Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Invited".

    onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Initializes the fragment, retrieves the event ID argument, and sets up Firestore.

    onCreateView(LayoutInflater inflater, ViewGroup container, Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Inflates the fragment layout, initializes UI elements, and sets up the RecyclerView.
    void
    onResume()
    Reloads invited entrants each time the tab becomes visible.

  • Method Details

    • newInstance

      public static InvitedFragment newInstance(String eventId)
      Use this factory method to create a new instance of this fragment using the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event to display invited entrants for.
      Returns:
      A new instance of fragment InvitedFragment.

    • onCreate

      public void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initializes the fragment, retrieves the event ID argument, and sets up Firestore.

    • onCreateView

      public View onCreateView(LayoutInflater inflater, ViewGroup container, Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Inflates the fragment layout, initializes UI elements, and sets up the RecyclerView.

      Returns:
      the inflated view

    • onResume

      public void onResume()
      Reloads invited entrants each time the tab becomes visible.
      Overrides:
      onResume in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment

    • loadInvitedEntrants

      private void loadInvitedEntrants()
      Loads all entrants with status "Invited" from Firestore.

    • loadProfileInfo

      private void loadProfileInfo(String deviceId, int index)
      Fetches the entrant's profile info from Firestore using their device ID. If a name is found, it replaces the temporary loading text in the RecyclerView.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant whose profile is being loaded
      index - the position in the list where the entrant's info should be updated

    • cancelEntrant

      private void cancelEntrant(Map<String,String> entrant)
      Cancels an invited entrant by updating their status to "Cancelled" in Firestore. Implements US 02.06.04.
      Parameters:
      entrant - the entrant data map containing the deviceId to cancel

    • notifyInvitedEntrants

      private void notifyInvitedEntrants()
      Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Invited". US 02.07.02 — Organizer sends notifications to all selected entrants.
